findings.description: The XML code block in s3 ends with `</component>` in the knowledge file, but the source file ends with `</property>`. The knowledge file silently corrected what appears to be a typo in the source, introducing content that has no basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source line: `</property>` (final closing tag of the XML block). Knowledge file: `</component>`.

findings.description: Inline field comments that describe the semantic meaning of each record field are omitted from both format definition file examples. These comments clarify field purpose (e.g., `# レコード区分(固定)`, `# 採番したユーザID`, `# 障害事由コード`, `# 問い合わせID`) and could help an AI answer questions about the format structure.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4: `1   dataKbn  X(1)  "2"   # レコード区分(固定)`, `2   loginId  X(20)  # ログインID`, etc. Source s5: `2   userId  X(10)  # 採番したユーザID`, `12  failureCode  X(20)  # 障害事由コード`, `32  userInfoId  X(20)  # 問い合わせID`.
